revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Iwashizu Shrine
| native_name = 伊和志豆神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Iwashizu Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.752639|135.34014}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Iwashizu Shrine'''|伊和志豆神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q135009906|ltq=Q135009906|qid=Q135009906|1=Massha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}}
** Series ordinal: 49
** P155: {{ill|Q1466105|ltq=Q1466105|qid=Q1466105|1=Hirota Shrine (Osaka City)}}
** P155: {{ill|Natsukino Shrine|lt=Natsukino Shrine|qid=Q135098906|1=Natsukino Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135039222|ltq=Q135039222|qid=Q135039222|1=Wokatano Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q864163|ltq=Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}}
* {{ill|Muko district|lt=Muko district|ja|武庫郡|zh|武庫郡|qid=Q11545988|1=Muko district}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.752639|135.34014}}

== described by source (P1343) ==

* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}}
** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041124115937/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=51003

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181069
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== P14005 (P14005) ==

* {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Iwashitsuno Shrine|lt=Iwashitsuno Shrine|qid=Q135039221|1=Iwashitsuno Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
